title: Bond Speak
description: Resource pack that changes the names of items to bond-like language.
body:
Ever wanted your Minecraft items to sound as slick as James Bond? This pack does exactly that. Now, when you see an item, like a spruce door, it’s not just a Spruce Door. It’s "Door. Spruce Door." Just like Bond would say it.

Simple, sharp, and a little bit classy. Every item gets the 007 treatment. Grab it, and make your inventory sound legendary.
